selectionReason: The current Users & Access panel rendered current scoped assignments, but each form still exposed Assign and Remove under a generic Save assignment button without explaining that Remove should match a current row and does not delete accounts or records.
userFacingImprovement: Site admins can read clear Assign/Remove boundaries and submit a Save access change action before changing scoped access.
privacyAndPermissionNotes: No API route, query parameter, role grant, permission helper, mutation behavior, tenant boundary, site boundary, program scope, mentor assignment scope, or student visibility changed.
The UI guidance sits on top of the existing scoped /api/site/access-assignments POST behavior.
Removal copy says changes are recorded for review and do not delete accounts, records, or student work.

candidateSummary.decision: rejected; mutation policy needs more review
deferred; audit-query UI shape needs review
deferred; hosted audit writes not allowed
deferred; audit destination shape needs review

validation.notes: Full validation passed; git diff --check reported only CRLF normalization warnings.

doNotRepeat: Do not re-add Users & Access Assign/Remove guidance unless data-site-access-action-guidance or Save access change regresses.

ladderHandoff.evidence: Users & Access assignment forms now explain Assign/Remove boundaries and use Save access change while preserving the existing scoped /api/site/access-assignments mutation path.
ladderHandoff.unlocks: Site admins can make safer access changes from the visible current-access summary.
ladderHandoff.next: Run hosted section-level permission proof when allowed; otherwise review access-assignment audit history visibility before exposing a timeline.
ladderHandoff.blockers: Hosted proof needs safe fake-account/audit runtime; access-history UI needs audit visibility review; missing-submission queue rows do not exist; archive retry/regenerate needs mutation policy.
